title: [Evermore Hotel, Lounge]
description: A haze of cigar smoke lingers above tuft-backed leather sofas that invite lounging in front of a stone fireplace with a silver-framed oil painting hanging above its blackened mantel.  Scattered along the dark wood-paneled walls, panes of stained glass separate tables into cozy booths.  A nacre-tiled clockface mosaic set into the polished floor seems to indicate that the time is perpetually midnight.

wayto.32115: ;e table = "Emerald"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
